name: HWR_MNTR_PLAN_GOALS_VL
query: SELECT B.GOAL_ID, B.PLAN_ID, B.PERSON_ID, B.MPG_ATTR_1, B.MPG_ATTR_2, T.GOAL_NAME, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_MNTR_PLAN_GOALS_B B, HWR_MNTR_PLAN_GOALS_TL T WHERE B.GOAL_ID = T.GOAL_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
